title: Lion (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Lion''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B Escort Frigate]] that was in service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
